answer: The top 5 counties with the highest number of state expenditure records in Texas for 2024 are Travis (1,511 records), Dallas (1,299 records), Harris (1,104 records), Bexar (896 records), and Williamson (804 records). These counties represent the largest clusters of state spending activity this year.
